mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction (category_id, amount, type, description, transaction_date) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{amount}, #{type}, #{description}, #{transactionDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE transaction SET category_id = #{categoryId}, amount = #{amount}, type = #{type}, description = #{description}, transaction_date = #{transactionDate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT t.* , c.name AS category_name FROM transaction t LEFT JOIN category c ON t.category_id = c.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
SELECT t.*, c.name AS category_name FROM transaction t LEFT JOIN category c ON t.category_id = c.id ORDER BY t.transaction_date DESC
SELECT t.*, c.name AS category_name FROM transaction t LEFT JOIN category c ON t.category_id = c.id WHERE t.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY t.transaction_date DESC
SELECT t.*, c.name AS category_name FROM transaction t LEFT JOIN category c ON t.category_id = c.id WHERE t.type = #{type} ORDER BY t.transaction_date DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount),0) FROM transaction WHERE type = 'EXPENSE' AND YEAR(transaction_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(transaction_date) = MONTH(CURDATE())

SELECT c.name AS categoryName,COALESCE(SUM(t.amount),0) AS total FROM transaction t JOIN category c ON t.category_id = c.id WHERE t.type = 'EXPENSE' AND YEAR(t.transaction_date) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(t.transaction_date) = MONTH(CURDATE()) GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY total DESC
